# Add non-voter: r1 has 3 voters, config says 5 replicas with 3 voters.
# MMA should add 2 non-voters.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=e
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

repair-needed
----
AddNonVoter: r1

# Round 1: repair adds a non-voter. With s1-s3 as existing replicas,
# s4 (zone=d) and s5 (zone=e) are equally diverse; one is chosen at random.
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n5,s5 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER) to range 1 on store 5
[mmaid=1] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n5,s5 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
[mmaid=1] result(success): AddNonVoter repair for r1, adding non-voter on s5
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=5 node-id=5 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the first addition: leaseholder reports 3 voters + 1 non-voter.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

# Still under-replicated: needs another non-voter.
repair-needed
----
AddNonVoter: r1

# Round 2: repair adds another non-voter. With s1-s3 and s5 as existing
# replicas, s4 (zone=d) is the only remaining candidate.
repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=2] applying replica change r1 type: AddReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER) to range 1 on store 4
[mmaid=2] addPendingRangeChange: change_id=2, range_id=1, change=r1 type: AddReplica target store n4,s4 (replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)->(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
[mmaid=2] result(success): AddNonVoter repair for r1, adding non-voter on s4
pending(2)
change-id=1 store-id=5 node-id=5 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s enacted=0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)
change-id=2 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)

# Pending change suppresses further repair.
repair-needed
----
RepairPending: r1

# Confirm the second addition: leaseholder reports 3 voters + 2 non-voters.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    store-id=5 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

# After both additions enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
